hero.tagline: Project management template for Claude Code
hero.description: One launcher, one command. Specialized agents, native TDD, integrated GitHub — ship your projects with quality and consistency.
problems.title: AI-assisted development lacks structure
problems.subtitle: Claude Code is powerful — but without a framework, every project starts from scratch.
problems.p1.title: Inconsistent workflows
problems.p1.desc: Every feature follows a different path. No standard, no systematic review, frequent gaps.
problems.p2.title: Lost context between sessions
problems.p2.desc: Claude doesn't remember the previous session. Version, decisions, project rules — everything gets repeated.
problems.p3.title: GitHub in silos
problems.p3.desc: Issues, milestones, PRs and releases managed manually, outside the development flow.
problems.p4.title: Tests written after the fact
problems.p4.desc: Tests arrive at the end of the cycle, poorly aligned with specs. Non-regression is never guaranteed.
workflow.title: CDP-orchestrated workflow
workflow.subtitle: Every command follows a precise pipeline. Agents work in parallel when possible, always validated at key gates.
wf.tests.desc: From plan + contracts · Unit / Integration / E2E
wf.review.desc: Quality · OWASP security · Contract coverage by tests
wf.qualif.desc: Infra validation · Smoke tests · Test URL
wf.gate4: Manual validation — CDP presents test scenarios
wf.gate4.ko: ✗ NO → label EN COURS → back to DEV
wf.prod.desc: Squash merge · Tag · CI/CD · Milestone auto-close if 100%
wf.cycles: Correction cycles max 3: REVIEW refuses → DEV fixes → REVIEW only. TEST-WRITER re-triggered only if scope changes (BREAKING/CHANGED in contracts/CHANGELOG.md).
github.title: Native GitHub integration
github.subtitle: The CDP drives issues, milestones and labels via the GitHub MCP plugin — no manual commands.
github.labels.title: Issue lifecycle
github.labels.desc: Each phase transition updates the label automatically.
github.labels.reset: Correction cycle or GATE 4 rejection → reset to EN COURS.
github.milestone.title: Milestones
github.milestone.desc: Sprint as GitHub milestones. Progress tracked, auto-close after PROD CI.
github.m.f4: Alert if open issues at deploy time
github.backlog.title: Backlog & workflow detection
features.title: Features
features.f1.title: Native TDD
features.f1.desc: The test-writer starts in parallel with DEV, from the plan and contracts. Existing tests are immutable unless a change is documented in contracts/CHANGELOG.md.
features.f2.title: Contract-first
features.f2.desc: The planner creates API contracts before any development. The reviewer verifies test coverage. BREAKING changes flagged at GATE 2.
features.f3.title: Parallel agents
features.f3.desc: DEV ∥ TEST-WRITER simultaneously. Backend ∥ Frontend if independent. Automatic merge conflict resolution before REVIEW.
features.f4.title: Issues & Milestones
features.f4.desc: Labels updated at each phase (PLANNING → EN COURS → EN REVIEW → EN QA → DONE → closed). Milestone auto-closed after PROD CI if 100%.
features.f5.title: 12 specialized agents
features.f5.desc: CDP, Planner, Dev, Test-Writer, Reviewer, QA, Infra, Deployer, Doc, Security, PR-Reviewer, Marketing. File-based deliverables, lightweight communication.
features.f6.title: STAGING → PROD pipeline
features.f6.desc: Infra validation before each deploy. Smoke tests. Integrated rollback. GATE 4 with test scenarios presented by the CDP.
features.f7.title: Session memory
features.f7.desc: /start-session reads project state, current version, active milestone and in-progress work. No repetition between sessions.
features.f8.title: Auto-generated marketing site
features.f8.desc: /marketing generates this site from closed milestone issues, CHANGELOG and README. Dynamic version and roadmap from GitHub.
